documentation_accuracy_summary: `docs/README.md:34-39,46-53,103-104` matches the shipped `/login`, `/app`, and `/onboarding/username` route inventory, the provider-registry boundary, onboarding gate, and required Google/GitHub callback configuration.
`docs/website-launch-guide.md:48-68,107-133` accurately documents the required callback URLs, `/api/auth/external/:provider/start|callback` routes, and the onboarding redirect flow back into `/app`.
test_sufficiency_summary: Verifier reran `npx --yes pnpm@10.0.0 install`, API lint/typecheck/test, and web lint/typecheck/test successfully.

Current automated coverage validates the happy-path provider flow and onboarding gate, but it does not test rejection of replayed/cross-browser OAuth state or refusal to link existing accounts when the provider email is unverified.
